visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with a choker-style neck strap, stands outdoors in front of a tea shop. She is speaking directly to the camera with an animated expression. Behind her, a large crowd of people forms a queue. The environment is a bright, urban street with natural daylight. (2) Close-up shot of a shop sign that reads "青山茶行" surrounded by stylized floral illustrations in blue and pink. (3) The woman is now seated at a table with three large white cups of milk tea. She picks up one cup to show the camera, gesturing with her hands. The setting is the outdoor seating area of the cafe. (4) Inside the shop, rows of silver metallic tea canisters with red labels are displayed on wooden shelves. The lighting is warm and indoor. (5) A close-up view of the top of a tea cup shows a leaf-shaped tea-flavored ice brick submerged in the liquid. The woman's hands hold the cup steady for the shot. (6) A second woman with short hair and bangs, wearing a white lacy top, is shown drinking from one of the white cups via a straw, looking pleasantly surprised. (7) The first woman returns to the frame, holding two cups and comparing them. She smiles and gestures frequently. The visual rhythm is fast with multiple jump cuts showing different perspectives of the drinks and the shop interior.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 平日也要排隊! [Subtitle]: 剛開半小時. (2) [Variety]: 就滿滿的人潮 [Subtitle]: 就滿滿的人潮. (3) [Subtitle]: 我的飲料好了. [Variety]: 招牌的琥珀冰磚奶. (4) [Subtitle]: 上面有一個茶葉型的茶磚很可愛 所以等下冰塊融化茶味也不會變淡. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後接下來我們自己點呢 是這個蜜香紅烏龍鮮奶 感覺是他們家的名牌之一 然後阿寶點的是這個. (6) [Variety]: 追夢人 有夢要追 [Subtitle]: 追夢人 你知道為什麼嗎 有夢要追. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為追夢人的茶葉 一斤最貴要2500 [Variety]: 一斤最貴要2,500. (8) [Subtitle]: 還有它超濃 我們來試喝看看 裡面是這種冰沙沙沙的感覺 哇這夏天喝感覺還是很爽快 琥珀冰磚奶 喝下去啊 它裡面是有點冰沙的口感 所以非常的解暑. (9) [Subtitle]: 因為它本身呢是有一定的甜度 然後它那個鮮奶油 他說它是用光泉自己做的鮮奶油 整體喝下來還是很順 然後不會有那種香精廉價的感覺 可以喝得到茶香 鮮奶跟鮮奶油混在一起的那種奶茶感 愛喝奶茶的人一定要試試看. (10) [Subtitle]: 好好喝喔 這是一個好喝的奶茶. (11) [Subtitle]: 這兩杯呢(蜜香紅烏龍鮮奶)(追夢人)都是無糖的 然後追夢人呢 這是那種濃茶感覺 所以如果你平常很喜歡比較茶味出眾的那種鮮奶歐蕾的話 這個很好喝 而且它的追夢人 它的茶味濃但是不會澀 所以我覺得很難得不澀的茶茶. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後這個蜜香紅烏龍鮮奶呢 就它本身是有一點點蜜香整體的口味就是順順的淡淡的 它不會有很濃的茶味 可是它就是跟奶50 50 自己都喝無糖的 但是我覺得琥珀冰磚奶真的很特別 愛喝濃茶的人我很推薦追夢人.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 13 people in the background queue and surrounding area.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and is wearing a black top with a neck strap. The other has short black hair with bangs and wears a white lacy/textured top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between an outdoor street in front of a tea shop, an outdoor seating area with tables, and the wooden interior of the shop filled with tea canisters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high pitch and enthusiastic energy, introducing the tea shop. Upbeat, bouncy electronic background music with a steady 4/4 beat starts immediately. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker's rate is fast, conveying excitement about the long queue. (3) A 'pop' sound effect occurs as the scene changes. The narrator's tone remains friendly and highly aroused as she describes the drinks. Street chatter is faintly audible in the background. (4) Another 'ding' SFX marks the mention of a specific drink. The BGM remains cheerful and major-key. (5) A second female voice enters briefly with a high-pitched exclamation of delight, '好好喝喔'. The acoustic texture is bright and dominated by mid-to-high frequencies. (6) A digital UI sound effect accompanies a graphic overlay on the screen. The primary speaker continues her detailed review with clear articulation. (7) The track concludes with the female voice encouraging viewers to try the tea, accompanied by the energetic BGM which then quickly fades out with a final rhythmic hit.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Product Presentation -> Tasting -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly energetic and detailed review of a popular tea shop in Tainan, highlighting its signature 'leaf ice brick' milk tea and encouraging followers to visit.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct naming of the shop, detailed product features, and positive personal recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical social media short-form video style with fast cuts, high vocal energy, and dense on-screen graphics to maintain viewer engagement.
